landing.joinTeam: 🔥 Join the team and trade with us!
landing.createAccount: 🚀 Create your account and trade with me
landing.heroTitle3: that protects and evolves the trader
landing.heroDesc: An artificial intelligence designed to analyze your behavior, protect your balance, and guide your decisions in the financial market.
landing.heroQuote: "Most traders lose because of behavior. Horus AI observes exactly that."
landing.sixModules: Six intelligent modules that transform the way you trade.
landing.aiMonitors: The AI continuously monitors your account and automatically intervenes when it detects risk patterns:
landing.protectionMsg3: The best decision now may be to stop for today.
landing.iaInsightMsg: Your pattern shows you trade better between 7pm and 9pm. Outside this window, your win rate drops 34%.
landing.behavioralMsg: Your behavior after a loss is worth more than your analysis before the entry. Discipline isn't about entering well — it's about knowing when to stop.
landing.horusAssistantDesc: AI-powered performance assistant that analyzes your behavior and reads charts in real time.
landing.liveOpsDesc: Live operations with technical analysis, management and real-time discipline.
landing.horusPlanDesc: An artificial intelligence created to monitor your trading behavior, protect your balance, and guide your decisions.
landing.securePayment: Secure payment via Pix • Instant access
landing.finalQuote: "The market shows the price. Horus AI shows your patterns."
landing.finalTitle1: Your balance doesn't break because of strategy.
landing.finalTitle2: It breaks when emotions take control.
landing.finalDesc: Join the community of traders who chose to protect their balance with artificial intelligence.
landing.footerDesc: Discipline and balance management platform for traders • Powered by Horus AI
landing.featureBehavioralDesc: Horus AI analyzes all your account data and identifies error patterns, impulsivity, and discipline breaks.
landing.featureChartDesc: Send a chart screenshot and receive an objective scenario reading with probability and direction suggestion.
landing.featureProtectionDesc: If emotional risk or a loss sequence is detected, Horus AI activates a protection mode and guides you to stop.
landing.featureAccountDesc: With just one click, the AI analyzes your evolution, detects behavioral patterns, and suggests improvements.
landing.featureDialogDesc: Chat with Horus AI about emotions, discipline, management, and behavior in the financial market.
landing.featureCheckinDesc: Before trading, the AI evaluates your mental state and identifies if it's a good time to enter the market.
landing.showcaseBehavioralDesc: AI analyzes your trade history, discipline score, and emotional patterns to generate personalized insights.
landing.showcaseBehavioralResponse: 🧠 Analysis: Your last 3 losses occurred after 3pm on high volatility days. Your score drops 23% when trading to recover losses. Recommendation: stop trading at 2:30pm on days with more than 2 losses.
landing.showcaseChartDesc: Send M5 or M15 chart screenshots and receive probabilistic analysis with entry points, scenarios, and confidence.
landing.showcaseChartResponse: 📊 Scenario: Uptrend with support at 1.0842. Suggested entry: 1.0855 (breakout). Confidence: 78%. Timeframe: M15. ⚠️ Warning: strong resistance at 1.0890, consider partial.
landing.showcaseAlertDesc: Automatically detects when you're in an emotional risk state and suggests breaks before collapse.
landing.showcaseAlertResponse: 🔴 ALERT: 3 consecutive losses detected. Revenge trading pattern identified. Last entry value 2x higher than normal. Recommendation: STOP now. Your balance will thank you tomorrow.
landing.showcaseInsightDesc: Advanced metrics about your best hours, most profitable pairs, and consistency patterns over time.
landing.showcaseInsightResponse: 📈 Performance: Best hours 9am-11am (73% win rate). Most profitable pair: EUR/USD (+$342). Days without emotional trading: 12. Your score rose 18 points this month. Keep it up! 🏆
landing.showcaseUserMsg0: Analyze my behavior from the last 7 days
landing.showcaseUserMsg1: Read this EUR/USD M15 chart screenshot
landing.showcaseUserMsg2: How am I doing emotionally today?

management.title: Balance Management
management.subtitle: Choose a model and trade with discipline.
management.loss2x0Rule: If 1 loss occurs, the cycle ends.
management.loss2x1Rule: This management allows up to 1 loss during the cycle.
management.info2x0Desc: This model was designed for those seeking more control and discipline in operations. In 2x0 management, the goal is to achieve 2 winning operations without accepting a loss within the cycle. If 1 loss occurs before the goal, the cycle ends. Enter your balance, check the recommended value per operation, and register each entry carefully. This model is ideal for those who prefer a more conservative approach focused on accuracy.
management.info2x1Desc: This model was developed for those who want more flexibility without losing balance control. In 2x1 management, the goal is to achieve 2 wins, accepting at most 1 loss during the cycle. If a second loss occurs, the cycle will end. Enter your balance, use the recommended value per operation, and register each entry correctly. This model is indicated for those seeking balance between safety and operational tolerance.
management.registerOpHelp: Register each cycle operation. The recommended value is calculated automatically but can be changed.
management.followedPlanQuestion: Did you follow your plan on this trade?
management.followedPlanDesc: This builds discipline awareness and feeds your Discipline Score.

horus.behaviorRadarDesc: Real-time analysis of your operational pattern
horus.weakestPoint: Your weakest point is {{label}} ({{value}}%). Focus on improving this aspect before increasing trade volume.
horus.strongestPoint: Your radar shows strong {{label}} ({{value}}%). Keep maintaining this pattern.
horus.balanced: Your behavior is balanced. Maintain consistency and focus on avoiding emotional deviations.
horus.safeFavorable: You are in favorable emotional conditions to trade. Maintain discipline.
horus.attentionCaution: Some warning signs were detected. Trade with caution and respect your management.
horus.riskElevated: Your current behavior indicates elevated risk. Consider reducing trade volume.
horus.criticalImpulsive: Your current state indicates high chance of impulsive decisions. We recommend stopping trades for today.
horus.bankSimulatorDesc: Projection based on your current pattern
horus.moderateDesc: Balanced risk, based on current pattern
horus.disclaimer: These values are projections based on your current pattern. Actual results may vary significantly.
horus.insightRecover: If you continue trying to recover losses on the same day, your growth curve tends to become unstable. Consider pausing after 2 consecutive losses.
horus.insightGood: If you maintain discipline and current win rate, your growth projection is very promising. Focus on consistency.
horus.insightModerate: Your current pattern shows moderate growth potential. Maintain management and avoid increasing risk.

checkin.title: Horus AI Check-in
checkin.subtitle: Intelligent behavioral analysis
checkin.q1Subtitle: Your Horus AI needs to know your real emotional state.
checkin.q2Subtitle: Your motivation defines your behavioral risk.
checkin.q3Subtitle: Sleep is performance. No sleep, no focus.
checkin.q4Label: Was there stress before opening the platform?
checkin.q5Label: Is your emotional state ready to accept a loss without leaving the plan?
checkin.q5Subtitle: A trader who knows how to lose, knows how to win.
checkin.healthyMsg: Your current state seems suitable for trading. Maintain discipline and respect your plan.
checkin.cautionMsg: Your state requires more caution today. If you decide to trade, do so with reduced risk and full respect for management.
checkin.highRiskMsg: Today doesn't seem like a good time to trade. Your current state strongly increases the risk of impulsivity and plan breaking.
checkin.horusObservesPattern: Horus AI doesn't just observe your trades. It observes your pattern.
checkin.choiceRecorded: Your choice will be recorded in your behavioral history.
checkin.persuasion1: Today your biggest risk isn't the market. It's your mental state.
checkin.persuasion2: Trading like this isn't courage. It's unnecessary exposure.
checkin.persuasion3: If you open a trade in this state, the chance of breaking your plan goes up significantly.
checkin.persuasion4: The market will be here tomorrow. Your balance needs to survive today.
checkin.persuasion5: Your history shows this type of state usually ends in error.

protection.title: PROTECTION MODE ACTIVATED
protection.lossesDetected: {{count}} consecutive losses detected · Impulsivity risk increased
protection.mainMsg1: From here on, the problem stops being strategy and becomes behavior.
protection.mainMsg2: Your next error may not be technical. It may be emotional.
protection.endDay: 🛑 End the day — protect the balance
protection.waitForPause: To continue trading, wait for the recommended pause to end.
protection.eventRecorded: This event has been recorded in your behavioral history.
protection.hardTruth1: Stop now. The next error tends to come from trying to recover, not from lack of analysis.
protection.hardTruth2: You're already in the zone where many traders destroy their entire day trying to fix two losses.
protection.hardTruth3: Your best decision now isn't to find a better entry. It's to preserve your mind and your balance.
protection.hardTruth4: Coming back tomorrow with clarity is worth more than insisting today under pressure.
protection.hardTruth5: Two consecutive losses are already enough to change your mental state. Respect that.
protection.position1: Most break after the second loss, not the first.
protection.position2: Your behavior after a loss is worth more than your analysis before the entry.
protection.position3: Discipline isn't just about entering well. It's about knowing when to stop.
protection.position4: Preserving the day is smarter than trying to save it on impulse.

dialog.title: Horus AI
dialog.dialogDesc: Chat with Horus AI about emotions, discipline, management, and the market.
dialog.processing: Horus AI reflecting on your question...
dialog.suggestion1: Why do I break my management?
dialog.suggestion2: How to stop trying to recover losses?
dialog.suggestion4: How to control emotions after a loss?
dialog.suggestion5: Is my problem strategy or behavior?
dialog.suggestion6: How to build a more stable trader routine?

quotes.q1: Most break after the second loss. Horus AI observes that.
quotes.q2: The market shows the price. Horus AI shows your behavior.
quotes.q3: Discipline isn't about entering well. It's about knowing when to stop.
quotes.q4: Horus AI observes patterns you don't notice.
quotes.q5: Preserving the day is smarter than trying to save it on impulse.
quotes.q7: The market will always be here tomorrow.
